evals.name: setup-i18n-workflow
evals.prompt: Set up a complete i18n workflow for my plugin including POT generation and JS translations.
evals.expected_output: Add Text Domain header. Call load_plugin_textdomain() on init. Use wp i18n make-pot to generate .pot. Explain PO→MO workflow. For JS: call wp_set_script_translations() after enqueue, run wp i18n make-json to generate .json from .po. Add pot-generation to composer/npm scripts.

evals.name: fix-translations-not-loading
evals.prompt: French translations exist but strings still show in English on the French site.
evals.expected_output: Diagnose: check Text Domain in plugin header matches __() calls and load_plugin_textdomain() argument. Verify languages/my-plugin-fr_FR.mo exists (not just .po). Check wp option get WPLANG returns fr_FR. Add debug filter on load_textdomain_mofile to log file path and existence. Run wp i18n make-mo if .mo missing.

evals.name: js-translations-not-working
evals.prompt: My block editor JS strings aren't being translated even though the .po file exists.
evals.expected_output: Check wp_set_script_translations() is called with correct handle matching wp_enqueue_script handle. Run wp i18n make-json languages/my-plugin-fr_FR.po --no-purge to generate .json file. Verify .json filename format matches expected {domain}-{locale}-{md5}.json. Confirm script handle is exact match.
